name: Patient
history: Involvement in a complex romantic situation with a person named Cleo. Cleo is in a long-distance relationship while also engaging with the patient.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I don't manage situations perfectly, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must understand and control my emotions to avoid feeling overwhelmed.
coping_strategies: Avoidance and distraction by focusing on minor issues at home and school.
situation: Saw concerning text messages from another person on Cleo's device.
auto_thought: I feel nervous and unsure about my ability to handle situations.
behavior: Avoids addressing the core issue by focusing on minor tasks and responsibilities.
